news.headline: Metropolitan Floors addresses confusion on acoustic ratings in condos and stratas, advocating for accuracy in measurements.
news.summary: Toronto-based company Metropolitan Floors is tackling a pressing matter in the flooring sector by addressing the increasing confusion and misunderstandings surrounding acoustic ratings in condominiums and strata properties. With more than 25 years of experience, the company has been actively involved in advocating for precise acoustic performance evaluations in practical situations. Metropolitan Floors aims to shed light on this frequently misinterpreted aspect of construction. By leveraging their expertise, they are striving to bring clarity to the issue.

news.headline: Coeptis Therapeutics (Nasdaq: COEP) expands license agreement with Deverra to include pandemic preparedness and emergency use.
news.summary: In Wexford, Pennsylvania on October 24, 2024, Coeptis Therapeutics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: COEP), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in cutting-edge cell therapy solutions for cancer, autoimmune, and infectious ailments, revealed a significant expansion in its operations. This development marks a pivotal moment for Coeptis as it continues to advance its innovative treatments.

news.headline: Genius Group launches GeniusGroup.AI to boost Genius Cities growth and enhance global AI education.
news.summary: Today, in Singapore on October 24th, 2024, Genius Group Limited (NYSE American: GNS), a prominent AI-driven education and acceleration organization, disclosed the introduction of GeniusGroup.AI. This launch aims to bolster the expansion of the Company’s Genius Cities Network and worldwide AI Education strategy.

news.headline: Wolters Kluwer's 2024 Future Ready Lawyer Survey: 700 legal professionals confident in managing AI-driven changes to business of law.
news.summary: Wolters Kluwer, a prominent provider of professional information and software solutions, has recently unveiled the outcomes of its survey on Future Ready Lawyers 2024. The survey, conducted among 700 legal professionals in law firms and corporate legal departments in the U.S. and nine European nations, offers key insights into the sector's transformation. The findings reveal significant challenges as the industry adapts to technological advancements, dynamic regulatory changes, and evolving client demands.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Blinken: I anticipate negotiators will be getting together on ceasefire in the coming days.
IEEE survey: AI expected to be most important tech by 2025, doubling other areas. Annual study highlights trends in cloud computing, robotics, XR, IIoT, quantum computing, and EV charging.
news.summary: A recent annual study focusing on Chief Information Officers (CIOs), Chief Technology Officers (CTOs), and other technology leaders has highlighted the predicted trends for 2025. The study anticipates significant advancements in technologies such as cloud computing, robotics, extended reality (XR), industrial internet of things, quantum computing, and electric vehicles (EV) charging. These technologies are expected to play crucial roles in shaping the technological landscape in the coming year. The study was conducted in Piscataway, New Jersey and was released on October 24, 2024. The findings underscore the increasing importance of these technologies in driving innovation and progress in various industries.

news.headline: CATL released the Freevoy Super Hybrid Battery with 400km electric range and 4C superfast charging, a breakthrough in sustainable travel.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, CATL introduced the Freevoy Super Hybrid Battery, marking the world's initial hybrid vehicle battery with a pure electric range surpassing 400 kilometers. This innovative battery also boasts 4C superfast charging capabilities, signaling a new phase for high-capacity EREV and PHEV batteries.

news.headline: "Surgical Directions presents a transformative approach to improve surgical flow by optimizing flip rooms for busy surgeons."
news.summary: In Chicago on October 24, 2024, a report highlights the popularity of flip rooms among surgeons seeking efficiency. Surgical Directions, a top healthcare consultancy specializing in perioperative services, introduces a new strategy to enhance surgical flow and boost surgeon efficiency by maximizing flip room utilization.

news.headline: IMF's Managing Director Georgieva: The global economy has held up remarkably well.
Metagenomi reveals new adenine base editors for wide genome editing efficiency at ESGCT.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the national unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. The number of jobs created in the last quarter exceeded expectations with a total of 300,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the last year has been revised upward to 3.2%, indicating a strong and growing economy. The stock market also saw significant gains, with the main index reaching a record high of 35,000 points. These positive economic indicators have led to increased consumer confidence and are expected to drive further growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Bristol City Leap project receives 2024 Award of Distinction for Public-Private Collaboration in Cities.
news.summary: Ameresco, Inc., a prominent cleantech integrator focusing on energy efficiency and renewable energy, has revealed that its Bristol City Leap (BCL) project was honored with the 2024 Award of Distinction for Public-Private Collaboration in Cities by the Global Partnership for Local Investment. The award, presented in partnership with UN-Habitat through the World Economic Forum, highlights the innovative collaboration in urban settings. Ameresco's BCL project stands out for its groundbreaking approach.

news.headline: Sinaptica Therapeutics to present 52-week Phase 2 study results for Alzheimer's disease at CTAD conference.
news.summary: Sinaptica Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, is a clinical-stage company at the forefront of developing personalized neuromodulation therapeutics for Alzheimer's and other primary neurodegenerative diseases. The company revealed that it will deliver an oral presentation showcasing findings from a 52-week Phase 2 study in Mild-to-Moderate Alzheimer’s disease at the Clinical Trials on Alzheimer’s Disease (CTAD) conference scheduled from October 29 to November 1, 2024 in Madrid. This event aims to provide insight and updates on advancements in the field of Alzheimer's research to a broad audience.

news.headline: Establishment Labs Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: ESTA) will announce Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7 after market close. Call at 4:30pm ET to discuss.
news.summary: Establishment Labs Holdings Inc., a company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol ESTA, is set to release its financial results for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024, on November 7, 2024, after the market closes. Following the announcement, a conference call will be held at 4:30 pm ET on the same day to elaborate on the results. For those interested in joining the conference call, please dial (877) 407-8037, if calling from the U.S.

news.headline: Prime Therapeutics research finds year-2 cost of care $4,200 higher for obese patients without diabetes starting GLP-1.
news.summary: A recent study conducted by Prime Therapeutics LLC in Eagan, Minnesota, has provided valuable insights for patients using GLP-1 medications. The study, which is considered a pioneer in the industry, revealed that individuals without diabetes who initiated glucagon-like peptide-1 (GLP-1) therapy experienced significant benefits. This new data, released on October 24, 2024, highlights the positive impact of GLP-1 medications on non-diabetic patients. This ongoing real-world study continues to offer important information, contributing to the growing body of knowledge in this field.

news.headline: Schneider Electric and United Solar Initiative collaborate to install microgrids at maternal healthcare clinics in Guatemala, improving maternal health and reducing infant mortality rates.
news.summary: A new initiative is increasing the implementation of microgrid solutions in developing countries, resulting in significant advancements in maternal healthcare and reducing infant mortality rates. These microgrids ensure a reliable energy supply, crucial for providing high-quality medical services at maternal health facilities. The program's expansion aims to address the pressing issue of insufficient energy access in underserved regions, ultimately improving healthcare outcomes for women and newborns.

news.headline: Poseida Therapeutics to present preclinical data on P-KLKB1-101 gene editing for Hereditary Angioedema at ACAAI 2024 meeting in San Diego.
news.summary: Significant findings will be presented at the American College of Allergy, Asthma & Immunology (ACAAI) 2024 Scientific Meeting in San Diego. Poseida Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTX), a clinical-stage allogeneic cell company, will share key data in a Distinguished Industry Oral Abstract presentation. This event, scheduled for October 24, 2024, will showcase vital statistics and insights from the company's research endeavors.

news.headline: Bentek won BenefitsPRO's 2024 Luminaries Award for Humanizing Benefits in Palm Beach Gardens. #TechProvider #Awards.
news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on October 24, 2024, Bentek®, a prominent benefits administration technology provider, was announced as part of the BenefitsPRO Luminaries Class of 2024 in the Humanizing Benefits category. This prestigious recognition highlights exceptional individuals and companies in the industry.

news.headline: LifeLoop introduces AI solution for senior living, improving staff productivity and resident experiences. - Denver, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In an announcement on October 24, 2024, in Denver, a major senior living software company introduced artificial intelligence innovations that are revolutionizing operations for operators in the industry. LifeLoop, known for its top-notch resident and staff experience platform, has implemented generative AI upgrades aimed at enhancing staff efficiency, optimizing workflows, and customizing resident interactions. These breakthrough AI enhancements are set to significantly impact the productivity of staff, ultimately improving the overall quality of care for residents.

news.headline: SERGEANT LLC debuts new Trucker Hat and Hoodie, offering timeless style and comfort. Leading manufacturer of tactical gear.
news.summary: SERGEANT LLC recently unveiled their latest collection featuring the timeless Trucker Hat and Hoodie, designed for everyday wear throughout the year. The renowned manufacturer of tactical, outdoor, and survival gear shared this exciting news from New York on October 24, 2024. The classic Trucker Hat and Hoodie by SERGEANT blend casual comfort with enduring style, catering to a wide audience of fashion enthusiasts and outdoor enthusiasts alike.

news.headline: Big Lots Foundation donates $200,000 for Hurricane relief in FL and NC through United Way.
news.summary: A $200,000 donation from the Big Lots Foundation will be allocated to aid local relief endeavors in Florida and North Carolina via the United Way's Disaster Relief Fund. This contribution aims to support recovery initiatives in communities affected by recent disasters.

news.headline: Trinasolar delivers 1 GW of Vertex N 720W modules to Jinsha River clean energy plant in China, entering critical construction phase.
news.summary: In Changzhou, China, as of October 24, 2024, Trinasolar has achieved a major accomplishment by supplying over 1 GW of its Vertex N 720W series modules to the Jinsha River upstream clean energy plant. The project is currently in a crucial stage of construction, marking a significant turning point in the utilization of renewable energy sources.

news.headline: SeekIn Inc presents new cost-effective two-step multi-cancer screening strategy at Early Detection of Cancer Conference in San Francisco.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in San Diego, SeekIn Inc, a renowned company specializing in blood-based cancer early detection and monitoring technology, unveiled its groundbreaking two-step multi-cancer screening strategy at the Early Detection of Cancer Conference held in San Francisco. This innovative approach aims to revolutionize the way cancer is detected and monitored by employing a comprehensive strategy.

news.headline: Hormel Foods acknowledged for top internship program by Vault in the US, among the top 150.
news.summary: In Austin, Minnesota on October 24, 2024, Hormel Foods Corporation, a Fortune 500 company in the global food industry, revealed that it has been acknowledged by Vault for possessing one of the nation's leading 150 internship programs. This recognition highlights the success of the company's acclaimed summer internship...

news.headline: Metron introduces WaterMasters™ full-service water monitoring for real estate and utilities, enhancing water management.
news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, Metron has introduced WaterMasters™, a comprehensive water monitoring service designed for real estate firms and utilities.

news.headline: Planet Fitness (PLNT) to release Q3 2024 results on Nov 7, 2024, discussing performance from Sept 30, 2024, before market.
news.summary: Planet Fitness, Inc. (NYSE: PLNT) based in Hampton, NH revealed that it will release its third-quarter financial results for the period ending September 30, 2024, on Thursday, November 7, 2024. The Company is set to discuss its performance and numbers for this quarter during its earnings call.

news.headline: PeoplesBank and Nymbus partner to launch "Employer-led Bank" and "Union Workers Financial Services" targeting financial wellness; 62% employees stressed.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, Nymbus has revealed a new partnership with PeoplesBank to introduce two innovative products named "Employer-led Bank" and "Union Workers Financial Services” (UWFS). This collaboration is aimed at addressing the urgent requirement for enhanced financial wellness resources, specifically in response to the 62% of employees who are facing stress due to their financial situations. Research indicates that 84% of employers recognize the significance of these tools in diminishing employee turnover. Through this partnership, the focus is on providing support to employees and union workers, helping improve their financial well-being.

news.headline: Tim DeSett joins HUB International as NA Commercial Lines President. Leading insurance brokerage; key in development.
news.summary: Hub International Limited (HUB), a prominent global insurance brokerage firm, revealed on October 24, 2024, that Tim DeSett has been appointed as the North American Commercial Lines President. Taking on this key position, DeSett will oversee the growth and strategy of HUB's Commercial division across North America. As a renowned leader in the insurance industry, his appointment is seen as a strategic move by HUB to further strengthen its presence in the market.

news.headline: Torus unveils energy storage and cybersecurity solutions at 47G Zero Gravity Summit in Salt Lake City, addressing grid stability and cyber threats.
news.summary: In South Salt Lake, Utah, Torus, a prominent player in advanced energy storage and management, introduced a range of cutting-edge commercial solutions at the 47G Zero Gravity Summit in Salt Lake City. These offerings aim to transform grid stability, bolster cybersecurity, and tackle crucial national security issues. The latest product series is geared towards addressing the escalating worries surrounding grid instability and cyber threats in the energy industry. Recent reports have highlighted a surge in cyberattacks targeting energy infrastructure.

news.headline: Hello Bello achieves Great Place to Work Certification™ under CEO Will Righeimer, promoting growth and positive workplace culture.
news.summary: CEO Will Righeimer is spearheading a strong growth strategy at Hello Bello in Los Angeles as of October 24, 2024. The company is known for offering top-quality diapers and pediatric items. Hello Bello Consumer Wellness LLC aims to empower employees and foster a positive workplace environment.

news.headline: Yakira Capital disputes Territorial Bancorp Board's concerns on acquisition offer from Blue Hill Advisors.Refuses to consider superior offer, risking breach of fiduciary duty.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of a company in Westport, CT is facing criticism for persisting in rejecting a better offer from Blue Hill Advisors, which could lead to a breach of their fiduciary responsibility. The incident occurred on October 24, 2024. Yakira Capital Management, an investment firm in Westport, CT, has raised concerns about this refusal. The specific amount of the offer and details of the potential breach were not disclosed in the news report.

news.headline: MSCI appoints Dr. Richard Mattison as Head of ESG and Climate, effective October 29, to lead product development and strategy.
news.summary: MSCI Inc has announced that Dr. Richard Mattison will be taking on the role of Head of ESG and Climate, starting on October 29. Dr. Mattison, appointed by the leading provider of decision support tools for investors, will be responsible for overseeing the development and strategy of ESG and Climate products. He will collaborate with MSCI's top executives including Chairman and CEO Henry Fernandez and President Baer Pettit to spearhead innovation and expansion across the organization.

news.headline: Ramp launches App Center for financial operations, providing best-in-class tools for finance organizations.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Ramp introduced the Ramp App Center, a centralized platform providing top-notch finance tools to help businesses save time and money. This hub enables developers to create integrations, enhancing financial operations.

news.headline: Renesas partners with Intel for power management solution for Intel Core Ultra 200V series, boosting battery efficiency.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Renesas has revealed a power management solution catering to laptops utilizing the latest Intel Core Ultra 200V series. This innovation promises superior battery efficiency, setting a new industry standard for performance in this category.

news.headline: BP Energy Partners invests in Novitech, a pipeline inspection tech company based in Dallas. Transaction closed on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, BP Energy Partners, LLC (BPEP) from Dallas, Texas, completed a growth investment in Novitech, Inc., a prominent company in inline pipeline inspection technology and data analytics. This investment involves important cities like Dallas, Denver, and Toronto.

news.headline: CroíValve implants new device for tricuspid regurgitation in US study, focusing on improving valve function.	TR prevention+dual valve system used in TANDEM II Early Feasibility Study.
news.summary: In Dublin, CroíValve, a medical device company, revealed that the DUO™ System was utilized on the initial patient in the U.S. for the TANDEM II Early Feasibility Study. This system is designed to address severe+ tricuspid regurgitation and operates alongside the natural tricuspid valve to enhance valve function without impacting the natural valve structure. The TANDEM II Study is focused on testing the effectiveness of the DUO™ System as a potential solution for TR, a condition affecting a significant number of individuals.

news.headline: US family caregivers provide $873.5 billion worth of labor, surpassing top global companies in revenue.
news.summary: A recent valuation study conducted by Columbia University Mailman School of Public Health and sponsored by Otsuka America Pharmaceutical, Inc. has found that if family caregiving was treated as a business entity, it would surpass the revenue of major corporations. The report reveals that family caregiving has the potential to generate greater revenue than Apple by 126%, Amazon by 45%, and Walmart by 31%. This highlights the significant economic impact of family caregiving, shedding light on the invaluable yet often unseen work that caregivers contribute to society.

news.headline: Standex declares 241st consecutive quarterly dividend of $0.32/share, 6.7% increase year-on-year. Payable Nov 22, 2024.
news.summary: Salem, New Hampshire - On October 24, 2024, Standex International Corporation (NYSE: SXI) disclosed a quarterly cash dividend of $0.32 per share, marking a 6.7% rise from the previous year. The dividend will be distributed on November 22, 2024, to shareholders as decided by the company's Board of Directors.

news.headline: Altium to showcase innovative industry solution Altium Discover at Electronica 2024, bringing stakeholders together.
news.summary: Altium, an industry leader in electronics design and lifecycle management, will unveil three innovative products at Electronica 2024 in Munich, Germany. The main focus will be on Altium Discover, a solution aimed at tackling key industry issues by creating a collaborative platform for semiconductor manufacturers, distributors, and product developers. This platform aims to foster trust and unity within the industry.(OpCodes: 1000)

news.headline: Adtran showcases OSA aPNT+™ platform at Jammertest 2024 in Norway, demonstrating resilience against jamming attacks.
news.summary: In Norway, Adtran unveiled the OSA aPNT+™ platform by its Oscilloquartz team, showcasing its reliability at Jammertest 2024. This assured positioning, navigation, and timing (PNT) solution proved its strength against jamming and spoofing attacks, confirming its importance in PNT security for sectors like mission-critical infrastructure and defense. This platform is designed to withstand real-world challenges and demonstrate resilience, positioning Adtran as a key player in advanced network synchronization.

news.headline: DeepCure to present the first ex vivo rheumatoid arthritis patient data for BRD4 (BD2) inhibitor DC-9476 at ACR Convergence 2024 in Boston.
news.summary: Boston-based DeepCure will be showcasing groundbreaking data at ACR Convergence 2024, revealing the initial ex vivo results of patients with Rheumatoid Arthritis who were treated with their selective BRD4 (BD2) Inhibitor DC-9476. This presentation marks a significant milestone in the field of AI technology in healthcare and drug development.

news.headline: Viant (NASDAQ: DSP) will release Q3 2024 financial results on Nov. 12, 2024, followed by a conference call at 2pm PT.
news.summary: Viant Technology Inc. (NASDAQ: DSP) from Irvine, California, has announced plans to unveil its third quarter 2024 financial outcomes post the closure of U.S. markets on Tuesday, November 12, 2024. The company is scheduled to conduct a conference call and webcast on the same day at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) to review both business and financial performances. Key details include: Date of Third Quarter 2024 Results and Conference Call: Tuesday, November 12, 2024; Time: 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time / 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: Yellowbrick Data and Coginiti partner to enhance analytics, BI, and AI with high-performance capabilities in hybrid, multi-cloud environments.
news.summary: Yellowbrick Data, a company based in Mountain View, California, has recently revealed an enhanced partnership with Coginiti, a prominent provider of cutting-edge data management and analytics solutions. Through this collaboration, organizations can convert unprocessed data into structured, queryable forms, delivering efficient, actionable insights for analytical, business intelligence, and artificial intelligence tasks in hybrid and multi-cloud setups. This joint effort aims to empower users by facilitating the seamless transition of data, thereby optimizing performance.

news.headline: REX Shares and Tuttle Capital Management launch 2X leveraged and inverse Ether ETPs, offering 200% and -200% exposure to Ethereum.
news.summary: In Miami, REX Shares, in collaboration with Tuttle Capital Management, has introduced two new additions to their T-REX ETF suite: the T-REX 2X Long Ether Daily Target ETF (CBOE: ETU) and the T-REX 2X Inverse Ether Daily Target ETF (CBOE: ETQ). These ETFs offer investors 200% and -200% exposure to Ethereum's daily performance respectively, utilizing "Reference Assets." The recent approval by the SEC for spot Ether ETFs signifies a significant advancement in the realm of ETPs.

news.headline: Former SentinelOne CFO, Bob Parker, joins Swimlane as new CFO; to support growth amid rising demand for AI-enhanced cybersecurity automation.
news.summary: In Denver today, Swimlane, a company specializing in automation for security organizations, revealed the selection of Bob Parker as its newest Chief Financial Officer. With a background rich in financial and business acumen, Parker joins Swimlane at a crucial time as the company addresses increasing interest in AI-driven automation for cybersecurity tasks. Parker's experience positions him well to aid Swimlane's expansion, having demonstrated success in boosting revenue, establishing top-tier teams, and maintaining a consistent track record of accomplishment.

news.headline: BioIVT to showcase Ki67 tissue staining service at Biomarkers U.S. 2024 and SITC 2024, to aid ADC development.
news.summary: BioIVT, a leading global research partner and biospecimen solutions provider for drug and diagnostic development, revealed its participation and sponsorship of the 8th Annual Biomarker & Precision Medicine U.S. Congress (Biomarkers U.S. 2024), as well as its exhibition at The Society for Immunotherapy of Cancer’s 39th Annual Meeting (SITC 2024). The company is set to showcase its latest Ki67 tissue staining service geared towards supporting ADC development. Tissue biospecimens carry immense significance for ADC advancement.

news.headline: Sensata Foundation awards annual grants to nonprofits for 2024-2025 cycle in Attleboro, Mass.
news.summary: In Attleboro, Massachusetts, Sensata Foundation, the philanthropic branch of Sensata Technologies, has revealed the recipients of its annual grants for the period of 2024-2025.

news.headline: ModMed launches automated commissions reporting solution for plastic surgeons and dermatologists to streamline practice management.
news.summary: A new feature has been introduced by ModMed in Boca Raton, Florida, to automate commission calculations and improve practice management for plastic surgeons and dermatologists. This new feature aims to streamline operations and enhance efficiency for professionals in these fields.

news.headline: 4imprint has completed the expansion of its Oshkosh Distribution Center, increasing production capacity, solar generation, employee amenities, and community investment.
news.summary: In Oshkosh, Wisconsin, the most recent expansion by 4imprint has boosted the facility's production capacity, solar generation, and employee amenities. This initiative also signifies a significant investment in the local community.

news.headline: a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. (NYSE: AKA) to report Q3 2024 financial results on Nov 7, 2024, webcast at 4:30 pm ET.
news.summary: In San Francisco, a.k.a. Brands Holding Corp. (NYSE: AKA), known for accelerating next generation fashion brands, revealed it will disclose its third quarter 2024 financial outcomes after market hours on Thursday, November 7, 2024. A call with management is scheduled for the same day at 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time (4:30 p.m. Eastern Time), accessible via webcast on the company's website at ir.aka-brands.com. Analysts and investors are encouraged to participate.

news.headline: Holiday décor demand remains strong despite inflation fears - National Tree Co. survey: 35% plan to buy a new artificial tree this year, with most budgeting $101-200.
news.summary: In Cranford, N.J., the top importer and wholesaler of artificial Christmas trees, National Tree Company, unveiled results from a national survey revealing that 35% of consumers plan on buying a new artificial tree this year. Among these consumers, the majority (31%) stated their budget falls within the $101 to $200 range, which was also the most favored range in 2023. Interestingly, 21% expressed willingness to shell out between $201 and...
